global.description: The ad features a teal background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings through the WayPoint app.

elements.label: Teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text logo reading 'WayPoint' in a contrasting color, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Large, bold text stating 'Last-minute savings' in a prominent position below the logo.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller text reading 'Hotels + flights in one tap' positioned directly below the main headline.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various abstract geometric shapes in lighter shades of teal, scattered in the background.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape in the background, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape in the background, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangular shape in the background, adding to the abstract design.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangular shape in the center, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Hotels flights in one tap' in a clear, readable font at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The same 'WayPoint' logo as before, reinforcing brand identity.

elements.label: Claim reward text
elements.description: Text stating 'Claim reward' at the bottom, encouraging user action.
